title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Rivigo

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
